candidate.objective: Dedicated and safety-focused Mobile Plant Operator and Leading Hand with over 15 years of experience across mining, civil, construction, and agricultural environments. Michael brings 10 years of hands-on mining experience including open pit operations at BHP Area C, BHP Kwinana Refinery, and Rio Tinto Brockman 4, Yandi, and Telfer. He has supervised teams of up to 30 Mobile Plant Operators and holds machine tickets across Excavator, Front End Loader, Skid Steer, Forklift, and Truck. A proven track record of leading safe, efficient, and high-production operations with no Lost Time Injuries in his mining career. Holds a Certificate IV in Training and Assessment and a valid HR Licence.

duties: Worked as part of a team of four completing contracts at over 30 Primary Schools throughout the Perth metropolitan region to construct new classrooms.
Operated Kubota 2T excavators, Kubota 475 bobcats, and drove Heavy Rigid Trucks (6-wheeler semi-trailers) for site works.
Used the bobcat for preparation work around classroom builds and formed up for concrete pouring.
Erected patios and operated trucks to cart sand and dispose of site waste.
Re-established existing grass areas and followed strict OH&S procedures including permanent fencing and careful hazard removal when working around children.
Delivered all contracts on time, on budget, and to high quality as preferred contractors.
Performed all-rounder duties across a range of civil and agricultural settings in support of SKC operations.
Operated excavators for demolition and earthworks projects across the Cannington area.
Performed deckhand and cook duties in a remote maritime and hospitality environment.

employment.location: Nullagine Gold Mine and BHP Kwinana Refinery, Western Australia
duties: Served as Leading Hand supervising a team of 28 to 30 Mobile Plant Operators.
Personally operated Hitachi 40T Excavators, CAT 992 Loaders, CAT D10T Dozers, and Water Carts.
Attended daily pre-start meetings and allocated machines to operators for each shift.
Performed daily maintenance checks on all equipment including oil, water, fuel, lights, tyre pressure, warning lights, and E-stop.
Extracted iron ore from the mesa, performing high-risk work cutting edges down the hill as required.
Provided operational direction to the team regarding ore grade changes, tip head changes, and area readiness.
Communicated with supervisors and team members via two-way radios and hand signals.
Worked day and night shifts with smooth handover management.
Completed earthworks for the construction of BHP's Kwinana Refinery and operated a Bobcat for concrete footing earthworks.
Followed all safety procedures including JHAs, Take 5s, and full PPE requirements.
Completed Certificate IV in Training and Assessment and gained valuable experience training operators on site.
Achieved KPI tonnage targets consistently and maintained a zero Lost Time Injury record.
Performed trade assistant and mobile hose fitting duties at Port Headland in support of heavy mining equipment maintenance.
Operated CAT 948 Loaders and CAT 246 Bobcats for ore handling and maintenance duties at Tanami Gold Mine.
Received underground material from the crusher, picked up rock using the loader, and tipped into the crusher head.
Transported fine material to the stockpile and maintained equipment including conveyors, screens, engines, and water suppressions.
Followed OH&S practices including JHAs, Take 5s, PPE, water suppression, and lighting for night shifts.
Increased production by 60% by minimising equipment downtime through proactive maintenance.

employment.role: Mobile Plant Operator / Leading Hand / Trade Assistant
employment.location: Area C, Brockman 4, Yandi, Telfer Mine — Pilbara, Western Australia
duties: Served as Leading Hand supervising a team of 8 Mobile Plant Operators across multiple Pilbara mine sites.
Completed poly pipeline dewatering jobs at Telfer Mine, Brockman 4, Yandi, and Area C.
Operated Hitachi 20T Excavators, CAT 948 Loaders, and CAT 246 Bobcats.
Constructed the water tank and assembled and heat-welded poly pipeline of all sizes.
Lowered bore pumps into the ground and pressure-tested pipeline systems.
Followed OH&S practices including JHAs, Take 5s, PPE, and exclusion zones.
Completed all projects safely, on time, and to requirements — enabling adequate water supply to mine operations.
Performed floor laying across residential and commercial contracts in Perth.

skills.detail: Extensive experience operating Excavators (Hitachi 1.5T–40T, Kubota 2T), Loaders (CAT 930–992), Dozers (CAT D6–D10), Water Carts, Bobcats (CAT 246, Kubota 475), Dump Trucks (CAT 777D), Grader (CAT 14H), Forklifts, and Semi-Trailers.

Experienced Leading Hand with proven capability supervising teams of 8 to 30 Mobile Plant Operators across open pit mining environments. Skilled in machine allocation, shift handover, and performance management.

10 years of open pit and underground mining experience at BHP Area C, BHP Kwinana Refinery, Rio Tinto Brockman 4, Yandi, Telfer, and Nullagine Gold Mine. Strong understanding of ore extraction, grade changes, and tip head management.
Experience assembling and heat-welding poly pipeline, lowering bore pumps, pressure-testing lines, and completing poly pipeline dewatering jobs at multiple Pilbara mine sites.
Holds Certificate IV in Training and Assessment and has experience training Mobile Plant Operators on site. Strong mentoring capability and commitment to knowledge transfer.

Truck licence — Down to Earth Training and Assessing, 2008.
Heavy Rigid vehicle drivers licence — current WA HR Licence.
